summary: Frontend UI enhancement testing completed. All requested features verified: Browser tab title 'TeacherHubPro', updated hero tagline 'Your complete classroom', AI Presentations section with gradient background, Transition selector (None/Fade/Slide/Zoom), and Save/Download buttons in Presentation Creator.
passed_tests: Browser tab title is 'TeacherHubPro' (not 'Emergent | Fullstack App')
Landing page hero says 'Tu aula completa en una plataforma' / 'Your complete classroom in one platform'
AI Presentations section visible on landing page with gradient background (cyan-blue-purple)
AI Presentations section shows '¡NUEVO! Presentaciones con IA' badge
AI Presentations section shows 'Transiciones activadas' indicator
Presentation Creator page loads correctly at /presentations
Transition selector visible with 4 options: Ninguna (None), Desvanecer (Fade), Deslizar (Slide), Zoom
Transition buttons have data-testid attributes (transition-none, transition-fade, transition-slide, transition-zoom)
Clicking transition buttons updates selection (highlighted in cyan)
Save button (Guardar) visible and functional - opens save dialog
Save dialog shows presentation name input field
Save functionality works - shows '¡Presentación guardada!' toast
Present mode shows transition type indicator (e.g., '✨ Slide')
Present mode shows 'Clic para avanzar' instruction
Present mode has close button (X) in top right
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI enhancement features verified: 1) Browser tab title updated to 'TeacherHubPro' in /app/frontend/public/index.html line 14, 2) Hero tagline updated to 'Your complete classroom' in Landing.js lines 275-280, 3) AI Presentations section added in Landing.js lines 688-771 with gradient background, 4) Transition selector added in PresentationCreator.js lines 1355-1388 with data-testid attributes, 5) Present mode shows transition indicator at bottom of screen.

hero_tagline.actual: Tu aula completa en una plataforma

ai_presentations_section.expected: AI Presentations section with gradient background
ai_presentations_section.actual: Section visible with cyan-blue-purple gradient, '¡NUEVO! Presentaciones con IA' badge, and 'Transiciones activadas' indicator

transition_selector.expected: Transition selector with None, Fade, Slide, Zoom options
transition_selector.actual: All 4 transition buttons visible with data-testid attributes, selection updates correctly

presentation_transitions.expected: Transitions apply when navigating between slides in Present mode
presentation_transitions.actual: Present mode shows transition type indicator (e.g., '✨ Slide') at bottom of screen

save_button.expected: Save button works in Presentation Creator
save_button.actual: Save button opens dialog, saves presentation, shows success toast

download_button.expected: Download button works in Presentation Creator

screenshots: .screenshots/landing_ai_section.png - AI Presentations section on landing page
